     the Fermi energy is    -0.1651 ev

!    total energy              =   -7324.02773478 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          3.4E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.18647164 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -150400.60009079 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   75909.96092781 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2813.84222205 Ry
